Description: 1-day price return (close-to-close percentage change)
5-day cumulative price return
20-day cumulative price return (~1 month momentum)
60-day cumulative price return (~3 month momentum)
Current price divided by 20-day SMA (>1 means above average)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's price and trailing 20 days

Description: Current price divided by 50-day SMA (>1 means above average)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's price and trailing 50 days

Description: Current price divided by 200-day SMA (>1 means above long-term average)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's price and trailing 200 days

Description: Number of trading days since the most recent SMA 200 cross event
Annualized standard deviation of daily returns over 20 days (short-term risk)
Annualized standard deviation of daily returns over 60 days (medium-term risk)
Ratio of 20-day to 60-day volatility — values <0.7 signal compression before breakout
Momentum acceleration: Return_5d minus Return_20d — captures accelerating price moves
Volume-price confirmation: Return_5d × Volume_Ratio — positive returns on high volume signal conviction
Current price divided by 52-week high (1.0 = at high; lower = further from peak)
Current price divided by 52-week low (1.0 = at low; higher = further from bottom)
Consecutive days Bollinger Band width is below its 20-day average — longer squeezes precede bigger breakouts
Today's volume divided by 20-day average volume (>1 means above-average trading activity)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's volume and trailing 20 days

Description: 3-day cumulative volume surge — average volume ratio over last 3 days
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 3 days of Volume_Ratio

Description: Continuous ratio of today's volume to 20-day average (e.g. 2.5 = volume is 2.5x average)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's volume and trailing 20 days

Description: Relative Strength Index over 14 days (0-100; >70 overbought, <30 oversold)
Moving Average Convergence Divergence: 12-day EMA minus 26-day EMA (momentum oscillator)
MACD histogram: MACD minus its 9-day signal line (measures momentum acceleration)
Bollinger Band width: (upper - lower) / middle band (measures price volatility envelope)
Position within Bollinger Bands: 0 = at lower band, 1 = at upper band, 0.5 = at middle
Total quarterly revenue from most recent filing before row date (expanded XBRL tags)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarterly operating income (revenue minus operating expenses)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarterly net income (bottom line profit after all expenses and taxes)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarterly diluted earnings per share
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Operating income divided by revenue (negative = operating loss)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Net income divided by revenue (negative = net loss)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total assets from quarterly balance sheet
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total debt (short-term + long-term borrowings)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total stockholders' equity (assets minus liabilities)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Stockholders' equity divided by shares outstanding
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total current assets (cash + receivables + inventory etc.)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total debt divided by stockholders' equity (leverage ratio)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Current assets divided by current liabilities (liquidity measure)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Return on equity: net income / stockholders' equity (profitability)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Return on assets: net income / total assets (asset efficiency)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Capital expenditures (investment in property/equipment)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarter-over-quarter revenue growth rate (current vs prior quarter)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarter-over-quarter net income growth rate
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: CBOE Volatility Index closing value (market fear gauge)
10-year US Treasury yield (risk-free rate benchmark)
13-week US Treasury bill rate (proxy for short-term interest rate / fed funds rate)
10-year minus 3-month Treasury yield (recession signal when inverted)
S&P 500 cumulative return over trailing 20 days (broad market momentum)
S&P 500 cumulative return over trailing 60 days (3-month market trend)
S&P 500 annualized 20-day return volatility (market risk level)
US Dollar Index 20-day return (currency strength)
Gold price 20-day return (safe haven demand)
Crude oil price 20-day return (energy/inflation proxy)
Earnings surprise: (actual EPS - estimated EPS) / |estimated EPS| × 100 from most recent reported quarter
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent reported earnings

Description: Actual reported EPS from most recent earnings release
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent reported earnings

Description: Number of calendar days since the most recent earnings report
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent reported earnings

Description: Number of calendar days until the next scheduled earnings report
Time Alignment: Aligned to next known earnings date

Description: Net income from most recent SEC 10-Q/10-K filing (independent of YFinance)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent filing before row date

Description: Operating cash flow from most recent SEC filing
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent filing before row date

Description: Number of days since the most recent SEC filing (staleness measure)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent filing before row date

Description: Percentage of shares sold short relative to float — high values signal bearish conviction
Days to cover: short interest / average daily volume — higher values mean shorts are more trapped
Percentage change in short interest vs prior period — rising shorts signal growing bearishness
Put/call volume ratio — >1 means more puts than calls (bearish sentiment)
Call volume as fraction of total options volume — higher means more bullish flow
Implied volatility skew: put IV minus call IV — positive skew signals demand for downside protection
Net insider buy transactions (buys minus sells) over trailing 90 days
Time Alignment: Aligned to 90-day window before row date

Description: Insider buy ratio: buys / total transactions over 90 days (1.0 = all buys)
Time Alignment: Aligned to 90-day window before row date

Description: Total insider transactions (buys + sells) over trailing 90 days
Time Alignment: Aligned to 90-day window before row date

Description: Number of Reddit mentions across investing subreddits in trailing 7 days
Average TextBlob sentiment polarity of Reddit posts in trailing 7 days (-1 to +1)
Fraction of Reddit posts with positive sentiment in trailing 7 days
Revenue growth × earnings surprise — companies beating estimates while growing fast
Model Importance (Rank): Not in current model (constant column dropped)
